entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange aggregator routing token swaps across EVM and Solana-compatible networks, with protocol integrator fees tracked by chain through a current first-party public API.
entity.notes: The current first-party domain provides the DropSwap exchange-aggregation surface. Its public protocol API reports daily integrator fees and revenue components across supported chains, and current independent adapter code consumes that API for Arbitrum, Base, BNB Chain, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, Ethereum, Unichain, HyperEVM, Sei, Berachain, Monad, Robinhood, Plasma, Linea, Scroll, Blast, Mantle, Gnosis, Soneium, Solana, and Abstract. No exact initial launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: DropSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party domain establishes the DropSwap identity and multi-chain swap-routing application surface.

evidence.title: DropSwap detailed fees by chain API
evidence.notes: Current first-party public API reports daily swap integrator fees and revenue components by supported blockchain, confirming active multi-chain routing operations.
